## Problem

<!-- What is the actual pain point? E.g., "arXiv silently rejects my
     project because X, and latex2arxiv doesn't catch it." -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- What should latex2arxiv do? A new pre-flight check? A flag?
     A change to existing behaviour? Be specific. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think of, and why didn't it fit? -->

## Who benefits

<!-- If applicable, paste a snippet of LaTeX or YAML that should
